project: Closed-loop Individualized image-guided Transcranial Ultrasonic Stimulation
title: Closed-loop Individualized image-guided Transcranial Ultrasonic Stimulation

czech_title.label: Czech title
czech_title.text: Personalizovana transkranialni ultrazvukova stimule rizena MRI snimkovanim

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: transcranial ultrasound stimulation, human brain, magnetic resonance imaging

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: We are joining forces across Europe to advance a new non-invasive technology - transcranial ultrasound stimulation (TUS) - to reversibly modulate brain regions with exquisite millimetre precision, even deep in the brain. As such, we aim to establish an urgently needed novel treatment option for neurological and psychiatric diseases. TUS combines the precision and reach of invasive deep brain stimulation, required to directly target clinically relevant structures, with the non-invasive and low-cost nature of transcranial electromagnetic techniques that are inherently limited in focus and depth.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Jaros Jiri, prof. Ing., Ph.D. (DCSY) – research leader Bayer David, Ing. (UPSY) Chlebik Jakub, Ing. (RG SC@FIT) Jaros Marta, Ing., Ph.D. (DCSY) Kunik Oliver, Ing. (DCSY) Kupco Patrik, Bc. Olsak Ondrej, Ing. (FIT)
